lisbon.name: Lisbon
lisbon.title: Lisbon, the city with Atlantic colors
lisbon.description: Let yourself be charmed by Lisbon, a city both historic and modern, where cobbled streets meet trendy neighborhoods and miradouros offer breathtaking views of the Atlantic Ocean. Discover our personalized guide that reveals the must-see places, our culinary recommendations, and practical information to prepare for your ideal summer!

to-know.language: Portuguese but English is widely understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 28°C, with sunny days and pleasantly cool evenings
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Tram (2€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

paris.name: Paris
paris.title: Paris, the city of light and romance
paris.description: Immerse yourself in the magic of Paris, where history meets modernity, and every street corner tells a story. From the iconic Eiffel Tower to charming Montmartre, discover our curated guide featuring must-see attractions, culinary delights, and essential tips for your perfect Parisian adventure!

to-know.language: French but English is widely spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 25°C, with occasional rain showers
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / RER (1.90€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, cash for small purchases

madrid.name: Madrid
madrid.title: Madrid, the vibrant heart of Spain
madrid.description: Explore Madrid, the Spanish capital, where art, culture and gastronomy meet in a warm and dynamic atmosphere. Stroll through its lively streets, discover its world-renowned museums and taste tapas in traditional bars. Our guide offers a selection of must-see places, culinary specialties to savor, and practical advice for a memorable stay.

to-know.language: Spanish, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 35°C in summer, with sunny days and warm evenings
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Train (1.50€ to 2€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

tokyo.name: Tokyo
tokyo.title: Tokyo, the futuristic and traditional Japanese metropolis
tokyo.description: Discover Tokyo, a city where modernity and tradition harmoniously coexist. From glittering skyscrapers to ancient temples, Tokyo offers a unique experience around every corner. Immerse yourself in the bustle of its vibrant districts, savor authentic Japanese cuisine, and explore the iconic places that make Tokyo an unmissable destination.

to-know.language: Japanese, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with hot and humid days
to-know.transport: Metro / Train / Bus (around 200¥ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, but carry cash for small businesses
tips.water: Drinkable from tap, but often filtered

rome.name: Rome
rome.title: Rome, the eternal city
rome.description: Step into the heart of ancient history and modern Italian culture in Rome. From the majestic Colosseum to the Vatican City, discover our comprehensive guide featuring iconic landmarks, authentic cuisine, and essential tips for your unforgettable Roman holiday!

dishes.name: Pasta Carbonara - Classic Roman pasta dish
Pizza Romana - Thin crust Roman pizza

to-know.language: Italian but English is widely spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 30°C, with hot summers and mild winters
to-know.transport: Tram / Bus / On foot (the city is easily walkable)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, cash for small purchases

milan.name: Milan
milan.title: Milan, the capital of fashion and design
milan.description: Discover Milan, a city where elegance and innovation meet. Known as the fashion capital, Milan is also rich in history and culture. Explore its iconic monuments, stroll through its trendy neighborhoods, and savor Milanese cuisine in traditional trattorias. Our guide offers a selection of must-see places, culinary specialties to taste, and practical advice for an unforgettable stay.

top-places.name: The Last Supper - Santa Maria delle Grazie Church

to-know.language: Italian, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with hot and sunny days
to-know.airport: Malpensa, Linate and Orio al Serio
to-know.transport: Metro / Tram / Bus (1.50€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

new-york.name: New York
new-york.title: New York, the city that never sleeps
new-york.description: Discover New York, a vibrant and cosmopolitan metropolis where each neighborhood offers a unique experience. From the iconic Statue of Liberty to the dazzling lights of Times Square, New York is a city of contrasts and energy. Explore its parks, world-renowned museums, and savor New York cuisine in its numerous restaurants and food trucks.

to-know.language: English, with many other languages spoken in the multicultural neighborhoods
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 30°C in summer, with hot and humid days
to-know.airport: John F. Kennedy, LaGuardia and Newark
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi ($2.75 per metro ride)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for tips

amsterdam.name: Amsterdam
amsterdam.title: Amsterdam, the city of canals and culture
amsterdam.description: Experience the unique charm of Amsterdam, where historic canals meet modern culture. From world-class museums to cozy cafés, discover our comprehensive guide featuring must-see attractions, local delicacies, and essential tips for your perfect Dutch adventure!

to-know.language: Dutch but English is widely spoken

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, cash for small purchases

sydney.name: Sydney
sydney.title: Sydney, the pearl of Australia
sydney.description: Discover Sydney, a dynamic and cosmopolitan city where nature and urban development meet harmoniously. From the iconic Sydney Opera House to the golden sand beaches of Bondi, Sydney offers a multitude of activities for all tastes. Explore its lush botanical gardens, historic neighborhoods, and savor Australian cuisine in its many restaurants and cafes.

top-places.name: Bondi Beach & Bondi to Coogee Walk

to-know.language: English
to-know.weather: Between 18°C and 26°C in summer, with sunny days and pleasant evenings
to-know.transport: Train / Bus / Ferry (Opal card recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

singapore.name: Singapore
singapore.title: Singapore, the futuristic garden city
singapore.description: Discover Singapore, a city-state where modernity meets lush vegetation. Known for its iconic skyscrapers and spectacular gardens, Singapore is a must-visit destination for culture, shopping, and gastronomy enthusiasts. Explore its multicultural neighborhoods, savor unique local dishes, and admire panoramic views from its many observation points.

to-know.language: English, Malay, Mandarin and Tamil
to-know.weather: Equatorial climate with temperatures between 25°C and 31°C year-round
to-know.transport: MRT / Bus / Taxi (EZ-Link card recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

barcelona.title: Barcelona, where Gaudí meets the Mediterranean
barcelona.description: Experience the vibrant energy of Barcelona, a city where modernist architecture meets Mediterranean charm. From Gaudí's masterpieces to the bustling La Rambla, discover our comprehensive guide featuring iconic landmarks, delicious tapas, and essential tips for your perfect Catalan adventure!

taipei.name: Taipei
taipei.title: Taipei, the city of thousand flavors and landscapes
taipei.description: Discover Taipei, the dynamic capital of Taiwan, where modernity meets tradition. From iconic skyscrapers like Taipei 101 to lively night markets, Taipei offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its historic temples, lush national parks, and savor Taiwanese cuisine that's renowned throughout the world.

seoul.name: Seoul
seoul.title: Seoul, the vibrant metropolis of South Korea
seoul.description: Discover Seoul, a city where tradition meets modernity. From royal palaces to futuristic skyscrapers, Seoul offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its lively neighborhoods, savor authentic Korean cuisine, and immerse yourself in the dynamic culture of this Asian capital.

london.name: London
london.title: London, a cosmopolitan and historic city
london.description: Explore London, a city where royal history meets vibrant modernity. From iconic landmarks like Buckingham Palace and the Tower of London to the lively neighborhoods of Covent Garden, London offers a unique experience to every visitor. Discover its world-renowned museums, enjoy traditional British cuisine, and experience the dynamic atmosphere of this international metropolis.

to-know.language: English
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 25°C in summer, with often cloudy days
to-know.airport: Heathrow, Gatwick, Stansted, Luton and London City

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, keep some cash for small purchases

dubai.name: Dubai
dubai.title: Dubai, the city of extravagance and innovation
dubai.description: Discover Dubai, a futuristic metropolis where bold architecture meets luxury and innovation. From iconic skyscrapers like the Burj Khalifa to the artificial islands of Palm Jumeirah, Dubai is a destination that never ceases to amaze. Explore its gigantic shopping malls, sunny beaches, and savor local cuisine in its numerous restaurants.

to-know.language: Arabic, but English is widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 40°C in summer, with very hot and sunny days
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi (Nol card recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

berlin.name: Berlin
berlin.title: Berlin, where history meets creativity
berlin.description: Discover Berlin, a city that perfectly blends its rich history with a vibrant contemporary culture. From the iconic Brandenburg Gate to the trendy neighborhoods of Kreuzberg, explore our comprehensive guide featuring must-see landmarks, local cuisine, and essential tips for your perfect Berlin experience!

to-know.language: German, but English is often understood in tourist areas

osaka.title: Osaka, street food and Japan's urban energy
osaka.description: Discover Osaka, a dynamic and welcoming city, known for its delicious street food and lively atmosphere. From historic monuments like Osaka Castle to the vibrant neighborhoods of Dotonbori, Osaka offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its modern attractions, savor local culinary specialties, and immerse yourself in authentic Japanese culture.

bangkok.name: Bangkok
bangkok.title: Bangkok, the city of angels and golden temples
bangkok.description: Discover Bangkok, a vibrant city where tradition meets modernity. From majestic temples like the Grand Palace and Wat Phra Kaew to the bustling markets of Khao San Road, Bangkok offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its floating markets, savor authentic Thai cuisine, and immerse yourself in the energy of this Asian metropolis.

top-places.name: The Grand Palace & Wat Phra Kaew

los-angeles.name: Los Angeles
los-angeles.title: Los Angeles, the city of angels and cinema
los-angeles.description: Discover Los Angeles, a city where Hollywood glamour meets the sunny beaches of California. From icons like the Hollywood Sign and the Walk of Fame to modern attractions like Universal Studios, L.A. offers an unforgettable experience. Explore its diverse neighborhoods, savor local cuisine, and enjoy the relaxed atmosphere of the West Coast.

to-know.language: English, but Spanish is also widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 35°C, with hot and sunny days
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi (Uber and Lyft available)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for tips

istanbul.name: Istanbul
istanbul.title: Istanbul, the city of a thousand and one wonders
istanbul.description: Discover Istanbul, a city where East meets West. From historic monuments like Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque to the bustling markets of the Grand Bazaar, Istanbul offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its majestic palaces, savor authentic Turkish cuisine, and enjoy a cruise on the Bosphorus to admire the city from another angle.

to-know.language: Turkish, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with sunny days and pleasant evenings
to-know.transport: Metro / Tram / Bus / Ferry (Istanbulkart recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small businesses

melbourne.name: Melbourne
melbourne.title: Melbourne, the cultural capital of Australia
melbourne.description: Discover Melbourne, a dynamic and cosmopolitan city, known for its flourishing arts scene and diverse cuisine. From architectural icons like Federation Square to the sunny beaches of St Kilda, Melbourne offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its vibrant markets, lush gardens, and savor a Flat White coffee in one of its many trendy cafes.

to-know.language: English
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 25°C in summer, with sunny days and mild nights
to-know.transport: Tram / Train / Bus (Myki card recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

dublin.name: Dublin
dublin.title: Dublin, the vibrant capital of Ireland
dublin.description: Discover Dublin, a city rich in history and culture, where Irish tradition meets a modern and dynamic atmosphere. From iconic institutions like Trinity College and St. Patrick's Cathedral to the lively pubs of Temple Bar, Dublin offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its castles, savor local cuisine, and enjoy a pint of Guinness in one of its famous pubs.

to-know.language: Irish and English
to-know.weather: Between 5°C and 20°C, with often cloudy and rainy days
to-know.transport: Bus / Tram (Luas) / Taxi (public transport is well developed)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

kyoto.name: Kyoto
kyoto.title: Kyoto, the city of temples and tradition
kyoto.description: Discover Kyoto, the ancient capital of Japan, famous for its historic temples, zen gardens, and traditional culture. From iconic sites like Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion) and Fushimi Inari Taisha to the picturesque streets of Gion, Kyoto offers an unforgettable experience. Explore its bamboo forests, savor kaiseki cuisine, and be enchanted by the serene atmosphere of this unique city.

to-know.language: Japanese, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 10°C and 30°C, with hot summers and cool winters
to-know.transport: Metro / Train / Bus (around 200¥ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small businesses

vienna.name: Vienna
vienna.title: Vienna, the imperial city of music
vienna.description: Experience the elegance of Vienna, where imperial history meets musical heritage. From the magnificent Schönbrunn Palace to the vibrant coffee house culture, discover our comprehensive guide featuring must-see attractions, Viennese delicacies, and essential tips for your perfect Austrian adventure!

to-know.language: German but English is widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between -5°C and 25°C, with cold winters and warm summers
to-know.transport: U-Bahn / Tram / Bus (2.40€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, cash for small purchases

venice.name: Venice
venice.title: Venice, the city of canals and gondolas
venice.description: Discover Venice, a unique city built on water, famous for its romantic canals, historic bridges, and breathtaking architecture. From the majestic St. Mark's Square to the beautiful Doge's Palace, every corner of Venice is a true masterpiece. Enjoy a gondola ride, explore the island of Murano, and savor the delicious Venetian cuisine.

to-know.language: Italian, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 10°C and 30°C, with hot summers and cool winters
to-know.transport: Vaporetto (water bus) / On foot (the city is easily walkable)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

kuala-lumpur.name: Kuala Lumpur
kuala-lumpur.title: Kuala Lumpur, the dynamic capital of Malaysia
kuala-lumpur.description: Discover Kuala Lumpur, a modern and cosmopolitan city, famous for its iconic skyscrapers and diverse culture. From the Petronas Twin Towers to the Batu Caves, Kuala Lumpur offers a unique experience blending tradition and modernity. Explore its museums, lush parks, and savor delicious Malaysian cuisine in its numerous restaurants and markets.

to-know.language: Malay, but English is widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 35°C, with a humid tropical climate
to-know.transport: Monorail / Bus / Taxi (Grab is popular for rides)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small purchases

athens.name: Athens
athens.title: Athens, the city of gods and history
athens.description: Discover Athens, the capital of Greece and the cradle of Western civilization. From iconic monuments like the Acropolis and the Parthenon to the charming streets of Plaka, Athens is a city where history and culture meet. Explore its fascinating museums, savor delicious Greek cuisine, and immerse yourself in the vibrant atmosphere of this historic metropolis.

to-know.language: Greek, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 10°C and 35°C, with hot summers and mild winters
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Tram (transportation ticket valid for 90 minutes at around 1.40€)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small purchases

toronto.name: Toronto
toronto.title: Toronto, the dynamic Canadian metropolis
toronto.description: Discover Toronto, Canada's largest city, known for its cultural diversity, iconic skyscrapers, and vibrant atmosphere. From the famous CN Tower to the Toronto Islands, this city offers a multitude of activities and sites to explore. Enjoy its lively markets, historic neighborhoods, and savor delicious local cuisine in its numerous restaurants.

to-know.language: English and French
to-know.weather: Between -5°C and 30°C, with cold winters and hot summers
to-know.transport: Metro / Tram / Bus (TTC)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

miami.name: Miami
miami.title: Miami, the sunny and vibrant city
miami.description: Discover Miami, a dynamic city known for its sunny beaches, diverse culture, and festive atmosphere. From iconic neighborhoods like South Beach and Little Havana to the colorful artworks of Wynwood Walls, Miami offers a unique experience. Enjoy its museums, lush gardens, and savor the delicious local cuisine in its numerous restaurants and markets.

to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 35°C, with hot and sunny days
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi (Uber and Lyft available)
